tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I used to think maybe you love me, now baby I'm sure.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
And I just can't wait 'till the day that you knock on my door.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Now everytime I go for the mailbox gotta hold myself down.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz I just cant wait 'till you write me you're coming around.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]B6[/ch]          [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab] [ch]A6[/ch]               [ch]B6[/ch]          [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab] [ch]A6[/ch]               [ch]B6[/ch]          [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And don't it feel good!  HEY! Alright now![/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
And don't it feel good!   Hey! YEAH![/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I used to think maybe you love me, now I know that it's true.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
AndI don't wanna spend my whole life just a-waitin' for you.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Now I don't want you back for the weekend, not back for a day.  No, no, no![/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz, baby, I just want you back and I want you to stay.   OH, YEAH, NOW![/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]B6[/ch]          [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab] [ch]A6[/ch]               [ch]B6[/ch]         [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab] [ch]A6[/ch]               [ch]B6[/ch]          [ch]A6[/ch]
I'm walking on sunshine... Whoah![/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And don't it feel good!  HEY! Alright now![/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
And don't it feel good!   YEAH! Oh, yeah now![/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
And don't it feel good![/tab]

[ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Walking on sunshine ...[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Walking on sunshine ...[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I feel alive, I feel the love, I feel a love that's really real![/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I feel alive, I feel the love, I feel a love that's really real![/tab]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I'm on sunshine! Baby oh![/tab]
I'm on sunshine! Baby oh!

repeat chorus
(and improvise;)
